da298d21-d3a4-4c19-b0f2-d86b8031ed79.title: Thin Website Angle
da298d21-d3a4-4c19-b0f2-d86b8031ed79.body: Open with: 'Your site is loading under 1KB — prospects Google you and bounce.' Tie to weaknesses from inspect_website.

209779ce-a665-4ff1-b28d-91e656d65abe.title: Too Expensive
209779ce-a665-4ff1-b28d-91e656d65abe.body: Reframe price as cost-of-inaction. Use review-volume gap or site-bounce estimate from inspection.
